item.title: ops/providers directory created without mode 0700 — provider manifest world-listable on multi-user systems
item.intent: ops/providers directory and .provider-manifest.json must be created with mode 0700/0600 so other local users cannot determine which cloud providers are installed
item.description: src/evolve/provider/manifest.ts line 38: mkdirSync(join(deployDir, MANIFEST_DIR), { recursive: true }) where MANIFEST_DIR = 'ops/providers'. This directory is NOT in scaffold.ts SCAFFOLD_DIRS — it is created on first use by saveProviderManifest() without a mode option. The file written (line 39: writeFileSync(path, ...)) also has no mode option — .provider-manifest.json is world-readable. ops/providers/.provider-manifest.json stores installed cloud provider names and their capability state. On a multi-user system, any user can enumerate which cloud providers are configured. No import of DIR_MODE_SECRET or FILE_MODE_SECRET exists in manifest.ts — both must be added.
acceptanceCriteria: ops/providers directory is created with mode 0700 — no other local user can enumerate which cloud providers are installed
.provider-manifest.json is written with mode 0600 — file contents are not readable by other local users
All tests pass with no regressions
